expected_condition: Balanced COD dataset must contain rows.
COD labels must include normal, degraded, and outage.
Each COD class must have at least 150 rows.
Forbidden leakage columns must not be COD input features.
All COD input features must exist.
All COD input features must be numeric.
COD input features must not contain missing values.
COD input features must not contain infinite values.
cod_label must not be included in input features.
Traceability metadata columns must be present.
Metadata columns must be excluded from COD inputs.
Degraded labels must come only from impaired degraded-sector rows.
Outage labels must come only from impaired outage-sector rows.
Normal rows must not be impaired-sector labels.
Feature-list input rows must match the selected COD input features.
